headline: Knox Hydrate
body: We are thrilled to announce an expansion of our partnership with Knox Hydrate, locking in the world’s fastest-growing hydration brand as the club’s Official Front-of-Shirt Partner in a three-year deal. Knox Hydrate branding will proudly feature on the front of all matchday shirts for the Men’s first team, Newcastle United Women, and the Academy teams from the start of the 2026-27 season. Read more: newcastleunited.com/en/news/… Video
raw_text:
We are thrilled to announce an expansion of our partnership with Knox Hydrate, locking in the world’s fastest-growing hydration brand as the club’s Official Front-of-Shirt Partner in a three-year deal.

Knox Hydrate branding will proudly feature on the front of all matchday shirts for the Men’s first team, Newcastle United Women, and the Academy teams from the start of the 2026-27 season.

Read more: newcastleunited.com/en/news/…

Video
text:

Knox Hydrate branding will proudly feature on the front of all matchday shirts for the Men’s first team, Newcastle United Women, and the Academy teams from the start of the 2026-27 season.
